output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q248297 ; wdt:P361 wd:Q41520 .
  ?player wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 ; p:P710 [ ps:P710 ?event ; pq:P2132 wd:Q2670332 ] .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
HAVING(COUNT(?event) >= 3 && COUNT(?event) <= 7)
